description:
In this episode of Better Human Better Dog we tell the story of a family completely trapped in fear.
Ricky and Bronnie are brothers who once played together peacefully, but after years of violent fights, their home has turned into a maximum-security prison filled with gates, barriers, and constant anxiety. Every day revolves around one goal: preventing another attack.
For these pet parents, life is no longer normal—it’s survival mode.
But when I step into the situation, I immediately see that th
title: These Brothers Tried to Bite Each Other | Better Human Better Dog | S04E05
